name: Mini's Mega Car Pack
tagline: 130+ cars. Every one tested. Every one configured.
description: The most curated car pack for BeamNG.drive. Every vehicle is individually tested, configured from scratch, and given custom thumbnails. No broken mods. No filler — just 130+ vehicles that load clean, drive right, and sit correctly in the spawn menu.

notes: Replaced broken Trabant 601 with working alternative
All default presets removed — custom configs for every car
Initial public release of the consolidated pack
Unified naming scheme across all vehicles
